rationale: Diff under review contains only execution metadata (manifest.json, result.json) — no code changes for JSON-LD content negotiation. None of AC1–AC5 can be evaluated against the provided diff.

findings.summary: No GraphQL/handler code changes present in diff; only .ddx execution evidence files added. AC1 (Accept: application/ld+json path) cannot be verified.
No schema/context generation code in diff; AC3 (@context derived from ESF schema with reserved-keyword remapping) cannot be verified.
No tests added in diff; AC4 (validation against jsonld.js/pyld) and AC5 (cargo test/clippy) cannot be confirmed from the changed-files set.
Implementation may exist in commit 672f328 (feat(graphql): add JSON-LD entity responses) but is not included in the changed-files list provided for review; reviewable diff is insufficient.
